A. What is the numerical value of the cyclical unemployment rate on Keene Island? B. Draw a correctly labeled graph of the aggregate demand, short-run aggregate supply; and long-run aggregate supply curves for Keene Island, and show each of the following: i. The current equilibrium real output price level, labeled Yz and PL , respectively ii. The full-employment output, labeled Y; C. The government of Keene Island is considering changing its spending to close the S1O0 million output gap in the short run. The marginal propensity to save in Keene Island is 0.20,and the government has a balanced budget: i. Calculate the minimum change in government spending and identify the direction of change needed to fully close the output gap in the short run: Show your work: ii. Assume the government of Keene Island changes government spending as determined in part C open pareniclose paren. On your graph in part B, show the effect of this change in government spending, labeling the new short-run equilibrium real output and price level Yz and PLz, respectively: iii. Explain: D.
